actuallyfinance_gtt.label: ActuallyFinance GTT
actuallyfinance_gtt.description: Score-based economic gate. Unemployment Rate Trend counts as 2; retail sales, industrial production, real income, and housing starts count as 1; timing turns on at score 2.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_1_retail_sales.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #1: Retail Sales
pe_gtt_1_retail_sales.description: Timing turns on when real retail sales YoY growth is below 0%.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_2_industrial_production.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #2: Industrial Production
pe_gtt_2_industrial_production.description: Timing turns on when industrial production YoY growth is below 0%.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_3_retail_or_industrial.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #3: Retail Sales or Industrial Production
pe_gtt_3_retail_or_industrial.description: Timing turns on when either real retail sales or industrial production YoY growth is below 0%.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_4_employment.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #4: Employment Growth
pe_gtt_4_employment.description: Timing turns on when labor-force-adjusted payroll employment YoY growth is below 0%.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_5_income_or_housing.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #5: Real Income or Housing Starts
pe_gtt_5_income_or_housing.description: Timing turns on when real personal income YoY growth is below 3% or labor-force-adjusted housing starts YoY growth is below -10%.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

pe_gtt_6_unrate.label: Philosophical Economics GTT #6: Unemployment Rate Trend
pe_gtt_6_unrate.description: Timing turns on when the unemployment rate is above its 12-month average.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.

actuallyfinance_gtt.label: ActuallyFinance GTT
actuallyfinance_gtt.description: Score-based economic gate. Unemployment Rate Trend counts as 2; retail sales, industrial production, real income, and housing starts count as 1; timing turns on at score 2.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from daily returns. Idle capital earns the cash proxy return; Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over that same cash series. A 10 bps bid/ask spread is modeled as a 5 bps one-way cost whenever a strategy changes between equity and cash.

pe_gtt_1_retail_sales.description: Timing turns on when real retail sales YoY growth is below 0%.

pe_gtt_5_income_or_housing.description: Timing turns on when real personal income YoY growth is below 3% or labor-force-adjusted housing starts YoY growth is below -10%.

actuallyfinance_gtt.label: ActuallyFinance GTT
actuallyfinance_gtt.description: Score-based economic gate. Unemployment Rate Trend counts as 2; retail sales, industrial production, real income, and housing starts count as 1; timing turns on at score 2.

summary.statsNote: Stats are computed from monthly returns. The trend signal updates at month-end; idle capital earns the compounded monthly cash proxy return. Sharpe and Sortino are calculated on excess returns over cash. Trading costs are set to 0 bps.
